scope: GSC-only analysis (58 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-16, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com) plus keywords-master.json. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: 8 of the 22 data-bearing tracked keywords hold page 1: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at 2.5 plus 7 terms in #4-10, including 'bariatric counseling' (4.5), 'bariatric therapist' (6.8), and 'bariatric counseling near me' (7.6).
'bariatric counseling' is the strongest mover with real volume: +7.7 positions to 4.5 on 17 impressions; its longer arc is 25.0 (2026-05-07) to 4.5 now - a new best.
Two commercial local terms remain far above their May baselines: 'weight loss counseling san antonio' 25.3 to 6.0 and 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' 23.0 to 6.0.
The hydration blog post remains the traffic engine: 15 clicks / 1,726 impressions at position 5.0, with the self-esteem (483 imp @ 7.6) and sleep (486 imp @ 10.1) posts also on page 1.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 22 of 82 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 60 show none. This is a keyword count, NOT a page count - the 82 keywords map to 50 distinct target pages (48 live www, 2 staging-targeted), and most formerly staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live (hygiene, not lost traffic).

Visibility drift continues: impressions 2,447 (2026-05-07) vs 1,247 (2026-07-16), and impression-weighted avg position 14.9 vs 23.4. Vs yesterday's run, impressions dipped again (1,459 to 1,247) and clicks fell 8 to 4.
CTR stays near zero: 4 clicks on 1,247 impressions (~0.3%); the sleep post (486 imp @ 10.1) and GLP-1 medications guide (237 imp @ 9.7) took 0 clicks at page-1 positions.

Slipped commercial terms: 'weight loss counseling' -14.0 to 34.8 (6 imp), 'weight loss counseling or therapy' -11.7 to 16.3 (6 imp), 'bariatric surgery counseling' -6.1 to 12.4 (5 imp, was #1 on 07-13).

Caveat: most tracked positions rest on single-digit impressions and swing day to day - treat all deltas, including 'bariatric counseling san antonio' easing from #1 in May to 2.5 on 2 impressions, as directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging-targeted targetUrls in keywords-master.json (what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor) to their live www URLs so GSC can match; if a staging-to-prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring a count from keyword data.

Fix CTR leakage: add CTAs and internal links from the high-impression blog posts (hydration 1,726 imp, sleep 486, self-esteem 483, GLP-1 medications 237 with 0 clicks) into the matching service pages; rewrite titles/meta on 0-click page-1 posts.

On-page refresh for the slipped weight-loss cluster ('weight loss counseling' 34.8, 'weight loss counseling or therapy' 16.3, 'bariatric surgery counseling' 12.4): retitle/re-intro against current page-1 competitors.

Defend the core local #2-10 block ('bariatric counseling san antonio' 2.5, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' 6.0, 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' 6.0) with fresh internal links and FAQ schema (bcc-faq-schema block) for rich-result/AI-overview eligibility.

Chase near-page-1 discovery terms surfacing organically: 'bariatric therapist near me' (26 imp @ 13.0) and 'holistic weight loss' (47 imp @ 36.1) - both map to existing pages and need only on-page reinforcement.
summary: Page-1 breadth held at 8 tracked keywords and 'bariatric counseling' hit a new best of 4.5 (+7.7), but sitewide impressions are down ~49% since early May (2,447 to 1,247), avg position drifted to 23.4, and CTR sits near 0.3%. Top priorities: convert high-impression blog traffic with CTAs/internal links and refresh the slipped weight-loss-counseling cluster.
